description: Schema.org Offer URLs on product pages point to .co.nz domain instead of .com.au
suggestion: Update schema JSON-LD to reference correct AU domain URLs

description: AU site content largely duplicated from NZ site with minimal market-specific differentiation
suggestion: Write unique AU-specific content, add local references and Australian pricing

description: Missing hreflang tags to indicate en-nz and en-au language/region targeting
suggestion: Add hreflang tags to all pages pointing to both country variants

description: Mobile page speed score ~55/100 on PageSpeed Insights
suggestion: Optimize images, enable compression, reduce server response time

description: Missing Organization and BreadcrumbList schema markup
suggestion: Add Organization schema with AU-specific business details

description: Product images missing descriptive alt text on AU site
suggestion: Add keyword-optimized alt text for all AU product images

description: Auto-generated meta descriptions on AU product pages
suggestion: Write unique meta descriptions for AU pages with local keywords

description: AU site pages have very thin content compared to NZ site
suggestion: Expand content with AU-specific information, customer stories, and local guides
